data.description:
## Why

Audit Maintainability finding #2 (MEDIUM). Mypy gates the full tree in CI (make typecheck) but runs in default mode — pyproject's [tool.mypy] sets only python_version, ignore_missing_imports, and follow_imports=silent. No disallow_untyped_defs, no check_untyped_defs: the gate catches inconsistencies among existing annotations but lets untyped code accumulate silently. In-practice discipline is decent (48 type: ignore, ~204 Any across 77k LOC), so the codebase is close enough to make a ratchet cheap. The repo already has a proven ratchet playbook (the BLE001 sweep drove a lint allowlist to empty).

## What

Phase 1: enable check_untyped_defs globally and fix the fallout (expected small). Phase 2: enable disallow_untyped_defs per package via [[tool.mypy.overrides]], starting with the packages that are already clean, and record the remaining-package list as the ratchet (a package can only be removed from the exempt list, never added — enforced by review convention or a small CI grep, mirroring the module-size allowlist pattern).

## Scope

In: pyproject [tool.mypy] config, mechanical annotation fixes needed to turn each flag on, the exempt-list convention/gate. Out: deep type-system refactors (Protocol extraction etc.), reducing the existing Any count as a goal in itself, third-party stub adoption beyond what the flags force.

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] check_untyped_defs=true globally; make typecheck green
- [ ] disallow_untyped_defs enabled for an initial set of already-clean packages via mypy overrides, with the exempt set explicitly enumerated in pyproject (comment-documented as a shrink-only list)
- [ ] A guard (CI grep or documented review rule) prevents the exempt list from growing
- [ ] No use of blanket ignore_errors or new type: ignore beyond a small, justified handful (each carries a code, e.g. type: ignore[arg-type])
- [ ] docs note (CONTRIBUTING or docs/architecture.md) describing the ratchet and how to graduate a package
data.title: Start the mypy strictness ratchet: check_untyped_defs now, disallow_untyped_defs per package
